creator: tz@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to mishin from comment #0)

> A compilation of a port 'archivers/php71-phar' breaks with following message:

I do need more information. Compiling the port with the default options works just fine on all supported FreeBSD versions. I double checked it.

So - what options do you use? Which commands do you type? What is in /etc/make.conf? 

Greetings,
Torsten
